# Sleuth Module Strategy Instructions
# Version: 1.0
# Last Updated: Auto-generated by learning loop

## Strategy: On-Chain Investigation & Whistleblowing

### On-Chain Scanner Rules
1. Scan Ethereum, Arbitrum, and BSC for:
   - New ERC-20 token launches (check for sniper bots, rugpull patterns)
   - Known malicious addresses (Chainalysis sanctions list)
   - Anomalous CEX deposit patterns (mixer -> Binance hot wallets)
2. Use graph analysis (networkx) to detect wallet clusters
3. Generate alerts with evidence: tx hashes, timestamps, addresses
4. Severity classification:
   - HIGH: Active exploitation, confirmed rugpull, large-scale theft
   - MEDIUM: Suspicious patterns, potential manipulation
   - LOW: Minor anomalies, informational only

### Data Broker Scanner Rules
1. Monitor data broker compliance with opt-out requests
2. Detect violations:
   - Geolocation data sold without consent
   - Health/financial data shared illegally
   - CCPA/GDPR non-compliance (failure to honor deletion requests)
3. Use test account to verify opt-out effectiveness
4. Generate DataBrokerAlert with evidence of violations

### Bounty Submission Rules
1. On HIGH severity on-chain alerts: auto-submit to crypto bounty programs
   - Binance Security, Web3Bounty, Arbitrum DAO
2. On data broker violations: submit to government programs
   - FTC (reportfraud@ftc.gov)
   - State AGs (California, New York, Texas, Florida)
   - XYLOPHONE for class-action leads
3. On financial fraud (insider trading, market manipulation):
   - SEC Office of Whistleblower
   - CFTC Enforcement Division
   - DOJ Criminal Investment Branch
4. Format evidence as PDF + JSON attachment
5. Log all submissions in DB to prevent duplicates
6. NEVER auto-submit to government agencies without user confirmation

### Legal Filing Rules (Compliance)
1. All legal documents are DRAFTS ONLY — never auto-file
2. Require explicit user approval before any filing
3. No UPL (Unauthorized Practice of Law) — always include disclaimer
4. Generate printable packets for courts without API filing
5. Track all legal drafts in DB with unique IDs

### Reward Distribution (Watchdog Token)
- 70% of confirmed bounty rewards -> reporter pool (WATCHDOG tokens)
- 20% -> DAO treasury
- 10% -> burned
- Track reporter identity and reward history
